content: Phase 1: Core POC — Gemini Vision NSFW + face detection, bidirectional filter logic in MongoDB
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 2: Backend implementation (auth, profile, photos, discovery, likes/matches, chat, albums, reports, admin, GDPR)
Phase 2: Frontend implementation (all pages + FilterDrawer, NsfwBlur, ChatWindow, etc.)
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
